name: rAthena Maps Knowledge Pack
description: Knowledge about server-side map_index.txt, map_cache, maps_athena.conf, and client-side map file dependencies.

entries.title: Map Index and Map Cache files
entries.summary: How maps are registered on the server.
entries.details: Every server map must be added to 'db/import/map_index.txt' (or db/map_index.txt) mapping to a unique numerical index, and configured inside 'conf/maps_athena.conf'. Additionally, the server compiles coordinates and passability data into a single bin 'db/map_cache.dat' (for standard servers) to speed up loading and collision detection.
warnings: Adding a map to maps_athena.conf without registering it in map_index.txt leads to server loading failures.

entries.title: Map Client-Side Trio File Dependencies
entries.summary: The three essential files required for a client map.
entries.details: Every map in the Ragnarok client consists of three interconnected files inside the GRF under the 'data/' directory: 1. .rsw (Resource World) stores overall map structure, lighting, and ambient assets. 2. .gnd (Ground) stores terrain elevations, tilesets, and texture coordinates. 3. .gat (Ground Attribute Table) stores passability grids, cell heights, and blockable areas.
warnings: A missing .gat file will cause immediate client crashes when teleporting or spawning on the map.
